$comment: UC-SBX-08 C-bucket triage — sidecar exemption manifest (tier-scoped). Each entry is a story id intentionally registered on only one platform. Cross-platform parity tooling MUST treat these as out-of-pool when computing tier-scoped percentage. Do not hand-edit without re-running triage.
scope_update_applied: tier-scoped 95% (atoms+molecules+organisms gates; templates advisory; infrastructure+modifiers exempt)

ios_only_exemptions.reason: iOS-only dark-theme variant of the full map stack. Organisms tier is already at 91.5% (above target); building a parallel Android dark variant is not gate-blocking and the dark theme is iOS-product-led.
iOS-only dark-theme variant of the map-only layer. Same rationale as full-stack-dark.
Templates tier is advisory (target 50%, no gate). iOS-only dark-theme planning template is a screen-level UX choice that does not need cross-platform parity.
